headline: Has The Market Mispriced Roper Technologies (ROP) After A 40.5% Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Roper Technologies at around US$344.42 is priced attractively or not, the valuation story behind that share price is where things get interesting. The stock has been relatively flat over the past month with a 0.1% return, but that sits against a much steeper 40.5% decline over the last year that may have changed how the market views its risk and return trade off. Recent headlines have focused on Roper Technologies as a software and technology group that has been...
